item.title: Bluey birthday cake nightmare leaves Gold Coast toddler in induced coma
item.description: The toddler was rushed to hospital after a freak accident with a common ingredient.

item.title: Kane Cornes explains decision to step down from AFL All Australian panel role after Sportsbet policy change
item.description: The expert commentator has made an admission as one of his fellow panellists faces up to ‘a hypothetical’.

item.title: Three people evacuated from cruise ship amid hantavirus outbreak
item.description: The rare virus has killed three people on the ship and left several others ill.

item.title: Australian basketball icon Lauren Jackson appointed to new WNBL leadership position
item.description: The legend is taking the reins after the former boss was let go in a ‘genuinely disappointing’ saga.

item.title: World No.1 Aryna Sabalenka flags shock grand slam boycott over prize money: ‘Only way’
item.description: ‘Without us there wouldn’t be a tournament and there wouldn’t be that entertainment.’

item.title: Aussie Cam Smith addresses retirement rumours amid LIV Golf’s uncertain future
item.description: The superstar golfer has been given ‘every assurance’ the league will continue beyond this year.

item.title: Madeleine McCann: British police push to extradite Christian Bruckner to UK in connection with girl’s disappearance
item.description: The development comes as the 20-year anniversary of the three-year-old’s disappearance approaches.

item.title: FedEx driver sentenced to death for murder of seven-year-old Athena Strand in Texas
item.description: The 34-year-old delivered a Christmas present to the girl’s house the day she went missing.

item.title: The Agenda Setters Stocks after R8: Buy, hold and sell
item.description: ‘He didn’t actually understand what to do.’

item.title: Adelaide 36ers coach Mike Wells quits one week after signing contract extension
item.description: The American has almost immediately backflipped on his decision and is heading home with a ‘heavy heart’.

item.title: Craig Foster slams Fed Square’s ‘ridiculous’ decision to not show Socceroos matches at World Cup
item.description: ‘All stakeholders should be working to overturn this absurd decision.’

item.title: Shocking data reveals taxis sent instead of ambulances to triple-0 calls in Tasmania
item.description: New data has exposed how seriously ill patients in one state are being transported to hospital.

item.title: Robert Irwin spills on his embarrassing blunder while dining with King Charles for lunch
item.description: The multi-talented animal conservationist is almost perfect, but he’d want his time again after this regrettable act.

item.title: Gold Coast parents issue urgent warning after toddler became unresponsive from inhaling metallic cake decorating powder
item.description: ‘His eyes were rolling in his head and he couldn’t breathe properly.’

item.title: Jack Purcell Meats collapses amid mounting pressure on family food businesses
item.description: The business grew into a juggernaut of more than 20 stores before mounting pressure and court action brought it undone.

item.title: Footage captures captain of hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius telling passengers about death onboard
item.description: Passengers and crew appear unaware a crisis is unfolding onboard in the footage.

item.title: One Nation volunteer captured on video in foul-mouthed confrontation with Liberal Senator James Paterson in seat of Farrer
item.description: The explosive confrontation was caught on camera.

item.title: Billionaire CNN founder Ted Turner dies aged 87
item.description: The outspoken TV pioneer was also renowned for his humanitarian work and 10-year marriage to Jane Fonda.

item.title: Nikita Tszyu takes down tough Spaniard Oscar Diaz during super-welterweight fight
item.description: The Aussie had to quickly apologies but his rival’s team was ‘very unhappy’.

item.title: Middle East war: Peace hopes revived as Iran reviews new US proposal to end conflict
item.description: Donald Trump issued a stark warning amid a stalemate over the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Pat Cummins leads Hyderabad Sunrisers to victory as Cooper Connolly joins IPL ton elite
item.description: ‘This is why Pat Cummins stands among the greatest leaders in cricket.’

item.title: New details as lawyer says David Warner accepts driving after wine with friends was ‘reckless, foolish’
item.description: The 11-minute timeline between the Aussie cricket great’s last drink and police stop has been revealed in court.

item.title: Mary Fowler crowned Women’s Super League champion as fellow Matildas suffer heartbreak
item.description: The superstar has officially ended Sam Kerr’s reign as champion after one Aussie ended the dreams of three more.

item.title: Jacinta Allan steps in to overturn Fed Square’s Socceroos ban ahead of 2026 World Cup
item.description: The Victorian premier has vowed not to let ‘a few d***heads’ ruin the World Cup for everyone.

item.title: Nick Riewoldt’s Carlton rebuild plan that has Patrick Cripps heading west and Harley Reid on the move
item.description: ‘All of a sudden you’ve built your next premiership midfield.’

item.title: Major data breach as private information of Australian students and teachers leaked
item.description: ‘This incident has impacted thousands of educational institutions.’

item.title: Did the PNG Chiefs’ latest PR stunt lean into their biggest concern?
item.description: Questions still linger after one glaring omission from the NRL expansion club’s charm offensive.

item.title: Woolworths brings back soft plastics recycling
item.description: Collection points will be available in 700 stores across five states.

item.title: Passenger killed in sinking car identified as young Western Sydney cricketer Mohammad Kashif
item.description: ‘His sudden passing has left a deep void, both emotionally and financially.’

item.title: South Australia snares Australian Open golf tournament but LIV Golf questions linger
item.description: Premier Peter Malinauskas has secured another sporting event as he admits he is ‘not naive’ to fears over LIV Golf’s future.

item.title: Brisbane hoon blitz sees eight arrested and two Ford Falcons seized after dangerous Gateway Bridge incident
item.description: Dozens of fines have been issued and cars seized in Queensland as police make a vow.

item.title: Much-loved jockey Braidon Small claims fairytale win on Instigator in Grand Annual Steeplechase
item.description: The inspirational hero won by the narrowest of margins in Australia’s most gruelling race.

item.title: What Avril Lavigne can teach Treasurer Jim Chalmers ahead of federal budget
item.description: Why’d the government have to go and make things so complicated?

item.title: WA Budget: Free fuel and family handouts as state posts big surplus
item.description: More than two million motorists will benefit.

item.title: Measles cases surge across Australia as vaccination rates decline, outbreaks occur overseas
item.description: Health authorities fear it could be spreading undetected in the community.

item.title: Florida surgeon who removed wrong organ says he is ‘forever traumatised’ by patient’s death
item.description: The 70-year-old was undergoing a planned splenectomy when things went terribly wrong.

item.title: Hantavirus cases now suspected in five countries as authorities scramble to contain outbreak from MV Hondius cruise ship
item.description: Australia is on alert as authorities in multiple countries race to contain the outbreak.

item.title: Iconic singer Bonnie Tyler placed in induced coma following emergency surgery
item.description: ‘All of her family, friends and fans will be concerned about this news.’

item.title: Tennis stars threaten to boycott French Open over prize money
item.description: ‘It’s not nice that after one year we are not even close to a conclusion.’

item.title: Former Australian Test batter Marcus North set to be appointed England national selector
item.description: It is the first time an Australian has held such a key role in England’s inner-sanctum.

item.title: Forgotten Aussie tennis star Alexei Popyrin returns with a bang in Italian Open
item.description: The Australian No.2 has been going through tennis hell, and even stepped away from the game.

item.title: The Only Way Is Essex star Jake Hall dies at the age of 35 in freak accident at a ‘wild party’ in Spain
item.description: The 35-year-old posted a tragic message on social media hours before his death.

item.title: Middle East war: Iran launches strikes on US navy amid struggle for control of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Trump has suspended the US military’s attempt to guide commercial ships through the strait.

item.title: Family update on toddler left fighting for life after inhaling metallic cake decorating powder
item.description: Young Dustin fell critically ill in a terrifying ordeal for his parents.

item.title: Celebrated naturalist David Attenborough turns 100
item.description: The filmmaker and conservationist has revealed his favourite place on the planet.

item.title: Adrian Portelli’s wild behind-the-scenes stunt revealed after bathroom slammed by My Reno Rules judges
item.description: The billionaire took matters into his own hands to make a controversial ‘fix’.

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor allegedly threatened by balaclava-clad man near home
item.description: An armed, balaclava-clad man approached the former prince as he was walking his dogs.

item.title: Prince George, Princess Charlotte and Prince Louis choose ‘brilliant name’ for new kangaroo joey at Australia Zoo
item.description: The latest collaboration further highlights the growing bond between the two families.

item.title: Communications Minister Anika Wells forced to repay more than $10k after travel audit uncovers rule breaches
item.description: The federal minister apologised for what she described as ‘honest mistakes’.

item.title: Matildas rising star Jada Whyman anounces ‘very sad’ decision to pause career amid knee injury struggles
item.description: A lengthy silence has been broken after a ‘freak’ accident cruelled the biggest moment of her career.

item.title: Meghan Markle shares new pictures of Prince Harry with their son Archie for his 7th birthday
item.description: The Duchess of Sussex also revealed a sweet glimpse into the children’s favourite TV shows.

item.title: Patti Newton reveals touching final promise she made to late husband Bert Newton
item.description: The veteran performer also opened up about her blossoming friendship with a fellow iconic star.

item.title: Richard Lewer claims $100,000 Archibald prize with piece shining light on Aboriginal Elder, Iluwanti Ken
item.description: The winner of Australia's biggest portrait award has been decided.

item.title: Julie Bishop quits top job at Australian National University
item.description: Bishop has resigned well before her tenure was due to end after a tumultuous period.

item.title: 'ISIS bride' Janai Safar fails in NSW court bid for freedom as Kawsar Ahmad and Zeinab Ahmad remanded in custody in Melbourne
item.description: She was charged with entering a prohibited area and being a member of a terrorist organisation.

item.title: No jail for Sydney teacher over 'gross' sexual texts to child
item.description: The 28-year-old sent messages detailing sexual contact to a ‘super young’ boy.

item.title: Man charged with harassing former prince Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor
item.description: A man in a mask ran towards Andrew while allegedly shouting abuse, according to reports.

item.title: Kia won’t abandon petrol power in EV transition, gives another ageing ICE car an update
item.description: Kia's shapely small SUV in Europe, the XCeed, has avoided the guillotine and been graced with another facelift like its Stonic sibling.

item.title: Driver charged after elderly pedestrian fatally hit by car in Cabramatta, Sydney
item.description: The elderly pedestrian was walking on a footpath when he was hit by the car.

item.title: Opel Corsa GSE hot hatch is a modern-day Holden Barina GSi... with electric power
item.description: Channeling a hot hatch once sold as a Holden, the Corsa GSE packs more punch than any Barina sold here – and then some.

item.title: Grand Central Shopping Centre locked down after alleged knife attack inside Toowoomba Woolworths
item.description: Police swarmed the supermarket after a lunchtime disturbance erupted into chaos.

item.title: Queensland students unable to submit assignments after cyber attack forces shutdown of QLearn and Canvas
item.description: Hackers accessed data linked to 1300 schools, leaving thousands scrambling to submit assignments and access coursework.

item.title: Three hikers killed in Mount Dukono volcano eruption in Indonesia
item.description: Mount Dukono has spewed a column of ash 10km into the sky.

item.title: Farrer by-election looms as crucial test for Angus Taylor's Liberal leadership as One Nation surges
item.description: A seat the Liberals have always held is now on the brink of falling.

item.title: Brisbane survive Carlton scare after late drama gifts Levi Ashcroft double free kick
item.description: ‘I just don’t know how they get sucked in, it just does my head in.’

item.description: ‘Happy 100th Birthday to our National Treasure.’

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Russia and Ukraine agree to three-day ceasefire as Donald Trump confirms major prisoner exchange
item.description: The truce comes as peace talks stall and both sides continue accusing each other of violating past ceasefires.

item.title: Mother’s Day joy for family of Perth boy Cruz Kelly fighting rare brain tumour
item.description: As he battles a rare and aggressive brain cancer, Cruz Kelly has taught his mum the power in seeking out joy during times of deep sadness and fear.

item.title: Hunt for gunman following major police pursuit in Sydney’s west
item.description: A major police operation was launched after the armed driver fled on foot and disappeared.

item.title: Seven things we like about the Honda CR-V
item.description: SPONSORED: Why Honda’s updated top-seller remains one of Australia’s most popular mid-size family SUVs.

item.title: 2026 Kia EV6 price and specs
item.description: Kia has given its low-slung EV6 electric SUV a mid-life update, bringing new looks, a longer range, and more performance for the flagship GT.

item.title: Spain prepares emergency evacuation of more than 140 passengers from hantavirus-stricken cruise ship after three deaths onboard
item.description: Authorities are scrambling to trace passengers across multiple countries after the deadly outbreak onboard the MV Hondius.

item.title: Australians want immediate relief from the budget, but economists warn the biggest fixes could take years
item.description: From fuel prices and tax offsets to housing and healthcare, economists say some of the budget measures Australians notice first may not deliver lasting relief.

item.title: Bathurst seeks $70 million for Mount Panorama upgrades
item.description: A funding push for upgrades to the Mount Panorama circuit has been put forward after years of setbacks for the hallowed venue.

item.title: Gold Coast toddler breathing on his own again after toxic cake decorating powder left him in induced coma
item.description: Doctors are still unsure whether the 14-month-old boy will suffer long-term lung damage after the decorative powder turned to sludge inside his lungs.

item.title: AFL great Luke Hodge behind genius move that’s revived Brisbane veteran Ryan Lester’s career
item.description: There has been a quiet transformation at Brisbane and the Hawthorn champ is behind it all.

item.title: Pentagon releases new UFO files as Trump administration promises ‘maximum transparency’ on unexplained sightings
item.description: The US military says is allowing the public to ‘make up their own minds’.

item.title: Alex de Minaur reduced to racquet-smashing frustration as alarming slump continues at Italian Open
item.description: It was another dispiriting setback for the Aussie as he clumped to a three-year low.

item.title: Comedian Shane Jacobson reveals surprising pub change sparked by local women at Dederang Hotel in rural Victoria
item.description: ‘We’ve tried to keep one foot in the past and one in the future.’

item.title: Trump warns expanded US naval operation could return if Iran peace talks fail but Tehran could withstand for months
item.description: But the US President says if talks fail, the country may reintroduce ‘Project Freedom’.

item.title: IKEA urgently recalls garlic press after fears metal fragments could break off into food
item.description: Customers have been told to stop using the item immediately after a production fault raised fears small metal pieces could be swallowed.

item.title: Teenage girl, 13, charged after alleged stolen SUV police pursuit across NSW South Coast
item.description: Two other girls, aged 14 and 15, were also charged after allegedly being passengers.

item.title: Melbourne Storm coach Craig Bellamy keeping ‘private’ battle with neurodegenerative disorder
item.description: ‘This is private to me.’

item.title: Farrer by-election: One Nation’s David Farley sweeps key seat in upset to Liberal heartland
item.description: ‘In the Australian democracy, One Nation has reached the end of its beginning.’

item.title: No April Fools' joke: Sydney Roosters star Victor Radley facing NRL ban
item.description: Victor Radley’s judiciary luck has finally run out.

item.title: NSW pours $39.3m into Firearms Registry to enforce tough new gun laws after Bondi terror attack
item.description: It follows the state introducing the toughest gun law reforms in the wake of the terror tragedy.

item.title: Maroons rocked as superstar Tom Dearden ruled out for at least six weeks with ankle injury
item.description: The halfback could miss the entire State of Origin series after scans confirmed a serious injury.

item.title: Four Australians aboard deadly hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius as DFAT examines repatriation options
item.description: ‘Our priority is the safety of the community.’

item.title: Sydney Swans grind out ‘really tough’ win over impressive North Melbourne
item.description: The ladder leaders were pushed all the way in a tight battle.

item.title: Geelong star Gryan Miers opens up on ‘stressful’ month after positive return in VFL
item.description: The important Cat revealed he is not ‘out of the woods’ as he manages a knee injury.

item.title: Giants take shot at Essendon’s finals record with ‘brutal’ banner
item.description: ‘This is the greatest thing ever.’

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Mortgage change that could save you $11,000 in two years as interest rates rise again
item.description: One financial expert says Aussies should take a day off work to make the change.

item.title: Knights star Greg Marzhew scores five tries as Dragons’ losing run continues
item.description: The winger had a day out to help his side to thumping win over their winless opponents.

item.title: Hundreds of Brisbane teens run riot after failed Scientology ‘speedrun’ attempt
item.description: A viral TikTok trend has sparked chaos with hundreds of teenagers storming the streets after attempting to breach the church.

item.title: Former Ironman champion Guy Leech launches new longevity program for everyday Australians
item.description: ‘There’s no magic bullet when it comes to health.’

item.title: AFL explains why Port Adelaide superstar Zak Butters avoided sanction for big bump
item.description: The superstar midfielder remains in Brownlow Medal contention.

item.title: Queensland extreme weather hunter Thomas Hinterdorfer opens up on life chasing America’s dangerous tornadoes
item.description: An Aussie storm chaser has spoken of the devastating scenes that will live with him forever, and the myth he wants settled.

item.title: ‘Concerning’ scenes as Manly star Siua Taukeiaho suffers suspected broken leg in win over Broncos
item.description: Play was halted for several minutes before the prop was taken to hospital.

item.title: Geelong ruin Scott Pendlebury’s record-equalling game as Pies ‘embarrassed’
item.description: The champion had a night to forget as he joined Brent Harvey at the top of the all-time games list.

item.title: Albanese Government unveils $2b housing infrastructure push to unlock 65,000 homes ahead of 2026 Federal Budget
item.description: ‘Right now, it’s too hard for too many Australians to get into their own home and get ahead, and that’s why we’re investing in supply.’

item.title: St Kilda captain Callum Wilkie suffers painful injury in tough loss to Gold Coast
item.description: The defender’s streak of playing every game since debut is now in jeopardy.
